I'm 5'3", 136 pounds and I ordered my usual medium, so it is true to size. The woven material has some stretch and give to it, which makes it comfortable, but it is dressier than a knit. It is hard to zip by myself, but I've mastered it and I'm not double jointed. When you are pulling the zipper up, pull the whole zipper base down, allowing you to zip it up higher to the point that you can then reach the top of the zipper and finish pulling it up. It did come slightly wrinkled but given the fabric, I think that was to be expected. I do have a good steamer, and with a bit of time they came out. I think you could use a regular iron on low, but I didn't, so proceed carefully if that is what you do. I think jumpsuits can be problematic, but this one is just what I wanted and I'm very happy with it.

One much better than the other! I bought two of these both in size medium—the pink floral and black polka dot. They are a very good price and I needed a dress quick to wear to a wedding shower. I would have kept them both. The odd thing is that no matter how many times I tried them both on, the pink floral was not flattering on my body. The pink one seemed to accent every pudgy pillow, bulge, and panty line. The darker color really did look better. Also, the pink floral one seemed to highlight more the vintage style of ruffles on the bodice and it reminded me of the aprons that my grandmother used to wear when I was a child. The black polka dot dress didn’t seem to do that. I kept and wore the black polka dot dress to the shower and am returning the pink floral. The dresses are unlined and the fabric feels a bit like crepe (slightly rough texture—not soft or silky feeling but stretchy and comfortable). They zip down the back. As a side benefit I wasn’t planning on, the theme of the wedding shower was in the style of two famous mouses and the polka dot dress fit in perfectly with that! I think I might wear that again as MM for Halloween! For reference, I am almost 5’ tall and weight 129 lbs. and got size medium which fits fine. I write honest reviews to help others make informed purchases because I read reviews myself and appreciate how they can be. I hope that my review helped you!

AMAZING! I cannot believe that I found a wedding dress on Amazon and that it was as inexpensive as it was but made so well. I was looking for a reception dress... Something sparkly, poofy, and overall, princess-like... Because when else will I have the chance to wear such a dress? I have a classic, elegant dress for the ceremony that I got from David's Bridal, but I wasn't going back there for another dress. It wasn't the best experience the first time and I wasn't looking to spend on a reception dress, as much as I did on the ceremony dress. I thought well, how bad could it be to look on Amazon and order something to try on? If I don't like it, I can send it back. I am utterly shocked and BEYOND happy with this gown. I also bought a hoopless petticoat to fill out the bottom and I'm wearing it in the pictures I attached to this review. Get the petticoat... You ordered a puffy dress, might as well embrace it. And I recommend the hoopless kind so when you sit, the dress doesn't stand up straight. Also, if it's windy, you see the hoops when the skirt material presses against the hoop. That doesn't happen with the hoopless kind. The back is a corset so it's forgiving in sizing and hips don't really factor in with this gown because it's so poofy. My only issue is that it is long. I am planning to wear flats so the dress is dragging on the ground by about 3 inches. If you wear high heels, or are taller than 5'5", then the length should be fine. I HIGHLY recommend this gown. Dream come true, really. For reference, I am 5'5", 34 D, 150 pounds, 37" chest, 31" waist, and 43" hips. I ordered both a size 8 and a 10. I tried on the 8 and it fit like a glove. I didn't even bother to take the 10 out to try it on. UPDATE: I had my seamstress add a sequined lace to the bottom of the tule skirt. I thought it would bring a bit more sparkle to the skirt part of the dress and it did that. But it also made the dress feel more finished. I'm beyond happy that I did that. (You can see the additional pictures of that in my review.)

LOVE this dress! I chose size Medium in purple. I am 5'3" and weigh 127 lbs. I am a 36B/C cup. Measurements 37, 30, 39. For me, at age 59, it is perfect. I could have worn a Small as the waist is a little loose, but it's not Baggy or sloppy and i like to feel comfortable. The length is perfect, tea length for flats or heels. I read some reviews about the tie looking poorly in the front?? The tie goes on the back! You can adjust the depth of the neckline with these ties. If I tie it completely closed it brings the neckline up more modest. The picture shows the straps tied leaving about a 5 inch gap. If you wanted more cleavage just leave a larger distance between the panels when you tie the back straps. I purchased a lavender slip from amazon seller Ekouaer for $14.99. Description Women's Nightgown Satin Slip Dress Sexy Lingerie Sleepwear Long Slip Silk Midi Dress Spaghetti Strap in size Medium. It is silk, not satin, so it isnt shiny. Its soft and lightweight. Lavender matches the purple dress perfectly, but could be used under any color dress (without lace panels). The slip lines the dress in the breast area, allowing braless or extra bra coverage. It's long enough to line to the lower, 2nd lace panel. The straps on the Slip are shoulder ties which allowed me to adjust the height of the slips neckline, so it would not show. I just tied a knot in each of the 2 straps where the back strap attaches to the back of the slip. I plan to wear this to my nieces outdoor wedding. I sent the bride a picture for approval and she loves it. I plan to order an ombre long scarf as a jacket for the evening reception. I ordered some colorful cream, lavender, purple and pink patent pumps but unsure if that will work. If not I will probably order nude, eggplant, deep maroon, ox blood or aubergine color pumps. This shade of purple is light, powdery, making it so versitile. I will coordinate my purse & jewelry once I have the shoes figured out, to tie the two colors together. I hope my review helps others make the best choice in size & color. I am very pleased with my Amazon purchase.

Graduation Dress! Nice Stretch For Curvy Girls| 38ddd breast size I chose this dress for my graduation. I am 5’3 around 155-160llbs. My breast size is 38ddd. I had soo many compliments. The only thing I will say is that even tho this dress can be flattering to curvy girls, if you are in the G range and up for bras make sure you buy a size up because the cups of the dress can be a little tricky or try using some boob tape.

buy it I chose this dress last minute for a wedding over one from Lucy in the Sky that was twice the price. The fabric was so much thicker than expected and photographed so well! I am very short (5 ft) and bigger chested (30 DD), so dresses normally don't flatter my body type, but I ordered an XS and it was so beautiful on. The fabric in the back draped down much lower than on the taller girls in the reviews, though. The front fabric on the boob area has no stretch, so I did have to flatten the girls with boob tape to fit the dress over. There's silicone there so it won't fall, too. If you don't need tape I would still recommend nipple covers! Fabric is thick but will show if you're cold lol. I'd cut the hanger straps too, they show in the open back when you tuck them in. Overall great dress, got so many compliments.

Beautiful and so chic I consider my body curvy with annoyingly large breasts (36G) which initially made me hesitate when buying this. I decided to give it a chance with some breast tape to go for a backless look despite my previous struggles with these styles. WOW, it was incredible. The satin is thicker than I expected which did a great job at draping over the various curves and pooches of my stomach and breasts as well as doing a good job at hiding the tape. Even though it isn’t a fitted style, the silhouette was slimming. I loved the adjustable band in the back which is a must with large breasts. The yellow color is absolutely stunning and perfect for spring/summer weddings. After steaming the creases out, it looks so luxurious. This dress definitely won’t support larger breasted folks, but with the right accessories, you can definitely pull off this backless look and still feel supported! I only took one star off because the lining was shorter than the length of the dress which mildly shows through the light colored fabric. Wasn’t a big enough deal for me to change how I felt about the dress. Definitely give it a try

Elegant, versatile, AND comfortable! I could wear this dress to a wedding, or to a block party, and it would look great at both places! Things to note: - The top is lined, but not the bottom. However, it is not at all see-through! Dark under clothes do not show through. - It is very well-made. The seams are even and flat, and the drape is perfect. - You will need to iron it. - The straps are tie design, so you can adjust where you would like to put them. I tried them lower in the back and up on the shoulders. - There is a detached tie belt that you can either use her not, to your discretion. - For reference, I am 5‘2“, approximately 110 pounds. I ordered a large, not being sure about online sizing. The large fits like a size 8 dress on me. But that’s fine, because I cannot stand anything tight or binding. I’m sure I would’ve been fine with a size smaller, but I like this one. - The green is a very cool shade of green, no warm or gold undertones. It’s a very misty and beautiful shade of green.

Maybe the greatest deal in Amazon history! I could write an essay about this dress. With my daughter’s wedding quickly approaching, I panicked about a week before, thinking the dress I had would be too tight and that it wasn’t making the “mother of the bride” statement I wanted. I scrolled through the Bezos Online Boutique and found this and thought “This is too good to be true.” I knew I wanted blue and I needed it yesterday. Only the XXL was available to get to me in time but you never really know what you’re going to get anyway so let’s roll the dice! Am I right? It fine well, not perfect but not terrible. For reference, I am about a 38/40 C/D. It depends on the bra. The sides were a little loose but the straps were adjustable so thst helped some. Some undergarment tape might have helped a little but it’s Texas. Length was a bit long. I am 5’2” so everything is long. It’s how I live. I added a petticoat under, which I trimmed about 2 inches off of and the dress looked great. I only got tripped up once and it was because I had forgotten to take the tags off. I danced all night and the dress held up. I felt like the sides got a little looser throughout the night. But I don’t think it was super obvious. I got so many compliments on this. An absolute steal! If I had time and my daughter said yes, I would have done the apricot in XL instead and I’m guessing it would have been a perfect fit.

Such an EFFORTLESS piece! Get your cameras out!! I decided at the very last minute (2 days before my 60th birthday) that I needed to commemorate an occasion as auspicious as admittance into the ELITE 60+ club with a mini photo shoot. I literally opened Amazon and searched "Photo Shoot Dresses" Found this one. I almost chickened out... it arrived 3 hours before my phot shoot... I took off my work clothes and literally pulled this over my head... I was wearing Spanx Boy shorts.. nothing else. I knew it would photograph like a much more expensive gown. Now, would I wear this to a gala... likely not. The weight of the fabric isnt substantial enough and I would spend the evening checking to make sure I wasnt overexposed. BUT, for what I wanted it was PERFECT... I am 5'11" wearing heels. I purchased in a 2x...it felt like I could have down a size but when I see the pictures, Im certain I was JUST RIGHT.

Love it! I decided fairly last minute to change a dress I was going to wear to a wedding and was pressed on time. As the wedding was going to be outside in the afternoon on an extremely hot day, I decided to go a shorter length than what I had. I am a fan of halter tops so that drew my attention, plus it looked like it would be a fun dress to dance in. I read all the reviews first and saw everyone responded so positively. I also took it to consideration that many said to size down, as I was contemplating between a small and medium. I am 5’3” and smaller on the top than the bottom so with the other reviews, I did not want this to seem big. Getting the small was the best decision as it fit perfectly (not oversized on the armholes, perfect length) and because of the style, it was fine on my curvier bottom half and laid nicely. The color seemed to be a touch more of a periwinkle than dusty blue, but I absolutely loved it, and it looked great with my silver and gold accessories. Got so many compliments on it…you would never know from the look and quality that I paid so little for it. Just plan on giving it a little steam due to it being packaged, but that’s all it needed.

This dress is perfection!! I decided to purchase this dress at the last minute for a wedding I was attending and it did not disappoint! For size referencing I'm just shy of 5'6", 150lbs curvier/athletic build/bottom heavy, usually a 6 in jeans (with stretch for my hips), 34B chest. I wanted the dress form-fitting so I went with the small and it fit like a dream. The material was nice and thick, it has the kind of stretch that tucks you in and hugs the right places. I have fairly broad shoulders but am part of the itty-bitty committee due to a large amount of weightloss, and the chest was even snug enough that it helped a bit with cleavange. Just an incredibly flattering fit, even the way the stitching follows your curves gives that compliment to your overall figure. It was a very comfortable wear for the whole evening, and I received tons of compliments. I'm already planning on purchasing more colors for upcoming occasions! Get the dress!!

Loved it! I decided to use this dress as my wedding dress. I ordered the burgundy but think they sent me the red. There wasn't enough time for me to send it back and get the right one. Which honestly ended up being a happy mistake. The only part I didn't like was the sparkly part of the waist band. It's was sequence and glass beads and these bigger ugly plastic gems. I thought I could just remove them and have a plain waist band but upon removal I noticed under the big plasic were black little spots, like if they tried to glue them on. I ended up buying a bridal belt and put that in the dress. Also I'm 5'3 and it was really long so I did have to get it hemmed because it was about 6 inches too long. I also had to have the straps altered because they were too big. All in all I was happy with it.

Gorgeous! I did have difficulty fitting due to bust size. I am 39" at the bust (36C), 150lb, 5'3". I needed an XL - which is what their size chart says. My suggested fit on Amazon was way off. There are complaints that the sequins catch. Yes, they do! You'll want to check yourself each time you stand up or smooth yourself down. It's not a big deal! I did have to watch out for the sleeves, as you might accidentally dip them into something. One thing I didn't like was that this dress zips the length of the back. The zipper does not have a tiny hole in which you could put a safety pin & ribbon to assist you in zipping up. It was a bit of a struggle. I got so many compliments! You will be focused on your dress the entire time, tho, due to the sequins catching & the sleeves. It's just too pretty to pass up, tho!

Amazing dress!!! I did have to have the dress altered slightly around the chest area because I am small chested (36 B) for my height/weight (5’5, 175.) The fabric was decently forgiving, but I wore a medieval shapewear torture device underneath, just to be sure everything was kept in place. The Kelly green color is such an easy transitional spring/summer color and the one-shoulder design ensured I didn’t get too hot. Buy this dress!!

Great dress I didn’t have high hopes to be honest. Buying a dress online without trying on makes me nervous and this isn’t super expensive either. But this was just as described, fits well and is super comfortable. I’m 5’7, 185 pounds. I’m a size 12 and the XL fit great.

Gorgeous Color & Super Flattering!! I didn't have much time to find a dress for my friend's summer wedding and this was the first thing I saw. After reading reviews and looking at pictures, I was undecided on what size to order because I always fall into the in-between category for a small or medium, so I ended up purchasing a small and medium dress. When they arrived, I was honestly shocked at how good the quality was. It wasn't a super thin material and wasn't see-through at all which I was nervous about because there was no liner in it. The medium ran a little big on me in the waist and was a little longer on me surprisingly. However, the small dress was definitely tighter on me in the butt but I still had room to dance and maneuver just fine without worrying about it ripping. I got so many compliments on this dress and it's definitely a perfect summer wedding guest dress especially here in Texas with the heat. I cannot recommend this dress enough it was just so pretty and had such a rich color. My only complaint (which is my fault) is that my sports bra was showing at the top a little bit but that's because I don't own a real bra or even know what type of bra to wear with this and I'm not a fan of the sticky petals so that's on me! just make sure to give it a little steam or run it through the washer and hang dry it so that the creases come out! :) For reference, I'm 5'10 & 150lbs if this helps anyone

Beautiful, tight for larger chest I do like this dress, however it is pretty tight around the neck/upper area. I'm 5'4" 135lbs 34D, muscular build. It's a tight fit for my breasts & tight from around my armpits to my neck. The length is perfect, although it is fuller at the bottom than I expected which makes me look "bulkier" around the waist. Had I sized up from a small to a medium, I think it would have been too large everywhere else. Theres no short slip underneath like some have so be careful in the wind, but it does have pockets which I love! Overall I like it, its beautiful, just not as comfortable as my other maxi dresses in this style bc of the tight upper half. I'd still buy again.

This dress is perfection! I don’t have anything bad to say about this dress, like wow!! I got the burnt orange color in velvet and based on other reviews felt like this style would be the best bang for my buck. The fabric has a nice weight so it hangs well, the cleavage clasp is in a great location, and the reviews that commented on the hole for wrapping it showing off skin are confusing because the hole is necessary for being a true wrap style dress (which I absolutely love being that I’m using this for my fall baby shower and want to be able to wear it postpartum as well) the easy fix to not having the hole show skin is to wrap the longer tie twice around and based on how long one is compared to the other it seems like that’s the design intention. I am 5’8” wearing a large, I weigh almost 190lbs close to full term and 170lbs prebaby. The large covers my body how I’m comfortable with while still being fitted and flattering. I could not be happier with this dress especially getting it on a sale for $40. Thank you for helping me feel pretty while so pregnant!

Absolutely loved this dress! I don't know what to say, buy it. I am 150lbs 5ft tall. I did hem it up a couple inches but I also wore platform heels with it. I got soooo many compliments. It was comfortable, light weight so I wasn't sweating on the tx heat, and it's just well made. My jewelry did snag a bit on it but it was just cheap jewelry that I found last minute. The adjustable zipper on the side slit was awesome. I could zip it down a bit to be modest but I unzipped it when we sat down for dinner tonight be more comfortable.

Exactly as a majority of reviews said. Gorgeous. I don't like buying clothes online, but I had a wedding to attend and realized I needed a dress on short notice. I couldn't find the one I had intended on wearing, and everything else I had was black or a bit too formal. I don't have a lot of "spare" cash, so I can't just pop into a major-brand retail store and pick something nice. This purchase was a surprisingly good decision that stayed within my budget. I'm not someone who does a lot of dressing up. I don't feel comfortable in fancy clothing most of the time, and special occasions are pretty much the only time you will find me in a dress. I'm 5'3 and 150ish lb with average endowments. I chose the size based on the reviews I read. The medium size dress was just a touch snug through the waist, but it was quite flattering. It is a little stretchy everywhere but the "belt" ribbon, so it gave as needed to keep me comfortable. I needed a second person to zip it up, and at first I wasn't aware that the zipper does unzip past the "belt" material. The material was exactly the color I ordered, which was a vibrant forest green I saw on the site. I am usually a blue color person, but that green is really nice! I intend to order a medium in the blue when they get them back in stock on the style I liked, but I ordered the green first on purpose. The lace on top is soft, not scratchy at all, the fabric of the outer skirt flows well, and the inner skirt is around knee length for good privacy coverage. If you don't like this style, search the Miusol brand. There are plenty more to choose from. I was tempted by several, but the ruffled v skirt looked like it would allow me to move well. It was excellent for dancing. I also chose this particular style because the reviews for most of the dresses by this brand said the skirt ran long for the person's height (even tall people). I didn't have time or a sewing machine to alter it, so I chose to trail gracefully in the back, and keep my front steps free as well as show off my shiny bling shoes. It was a good decision. The skirt was a touch long for me, but since it was only long in the back, I was able to pull it off as an intentional design, not an "oops, I couldn't alter it in time" faux-pas with me tripping every other step. One more note. It is machine wash cold with like colors and line dry. It does need a touch of ironing for the skirt but it looks great even with a couple of wrinkles. Do I recommend? DEFINITELY. Worth. Every. Penny.

One is perfect and Another one is too big.. I first bought the white and blue dress by Bell Poque, and I LOVED it! The style, the length, the colors and patterns, everything was fantastic. So when I got a notification about their another dress had a deal, I immediately placed an order. I got the blue-yellow floral this time because I thought the combination of those colors is so unique and fun. When I tried it on, the fit felt different, especially the chest area. It felt bigger and I didn’t feel comfortable bending over to pick up something in it. So I compared it with my first dress, and it turned out that the chest area for this blue-yellow dress was about 2” bigger, as you can see in my photos. Ugh… I’m not sure why the same size differs this much, but I was absolutely heartbroken because I LOVE the dress! But it’s going to cost about the same to take it to the alterations, so I returned the second dress. I'm super disappointed. By the way, I’m 5/6” and about 160 lb, usually wear XL for most of the clothes, including dresses like those. The first one fits me perfectly, but not the second one. Oh, my bra size is 38C if that helps. The first white dress - 10 stars! This (second) blue-yellow dress - 2 stars...

Eye-Catching and Comfortable Pantsuit I generally prefer single-breasted jackets since double-breasted jackets look good primarily on those 5'10" or taller, and I have suits but only cleverly designed black skirt-suits for work -- yet no full-on pantsuit. Now I do, and is it ever eye-catching and comfortable! Nicely lined, this red pantsuit in a Large fit my size 14 body well, and I appreciated the stretch in the waistband in the back for bending and stretching. The button and zip-front to the pants makes for a polished look from the front, too. I tried it with one button buttoned, both buttons buttoned, and then no buttons buttoned, and all three ways worked to look good. The length of the sleeves and the pants work well. The lining in the jacket is very nice, but overall the suit is not so heavy as are my other suits, so this pantsuit could be used in warmer weather than my skirt-suits actually. I was surprised to read that the pantsuit was supposedly able to be washed rather than dry cleaned, especially with the jacket being lined, but the tag did mention that it also could be dry cleaned, the option I'll probably use for the jacket at the least. Having pockets in both the jacket and the pants means that I could potentially not even need to carry a purse sometimes, too, depending on what I need to bring with me from my office for meetings and the like. I'm delighted with this product and pleased that it's lightweight enough that I could likely pack it for conventions out of state also if I didn't choose to wear it on the plane -- it's that comfortable, really, that I could even think about wearing it on a plane! In red, it's particularly eye-catching, but I have so much black in my wardrobe, I thought why not go big with this choice? And I'm glad I did! I heartily recommend this pantsuit!

Weird neckline I got a 2XL. 5' 8" 198lbs. Hello all. I'm writing this review to help you decide. First I am 6 months post partum and not breastfeeding. I went down naturally to 198, I gained weight, and now I'm back to 198. I don't have an hour glass figure and have a wide waist naturally. For the picture I am not wearing a control top, which I probably will get a control top with shorts for the dresses. I am wearing a molded (padded) underwire bra. I washed the clothes on cold delicate cycle and dried on delicate cycle, then I ironed/steamed them. I am writing multiple reviews for clothes I bought for prime day so this part is the informational section I am putting on all the reviews. I measure around 43"over bust-36" narrowest part of waist-46"widest part of hips. This dress is almost great but if you look at the model, it's made to show your bra straps which isn't that great in a business setting. There is also too much neckline so that the material comes off my skin. I'm not sure if this would be fixed if I had bought a smaller size. For the price I got it for, I'll just fix these problems by wearing a business blazer. Dress is soft and thick stretchy material, it would probably look way better with a control top or -20lbs :)

high quality, floofiest of dresses I got a size 6 in black, and the bust is way too big, but honestly even if I didn't get it tailored to fit, you don't really notice how big the bust is on me (see pictures). My bust is 85 cm, my nat waist is 71 cm, and my hips are at 81 cm (hips don't matter - A-line dress). I'm 5'6 and in ~2.5 inch heels, the dress hit exactly where it should. Fit me super well for a dress not literally made for my body. Truly as close to the original picture as you can expect. Wonderful, thick quality, well-sewn. The back has a wonderful set of buttons, but a slight note, the buttons have white string to pull them closed which stands out on the black fabric (not really good or bad, but something). I'm giving it 5 stars even though it had a slight problem (see below) because honestly you could not get a better quality dress for the price. There is a built-in bra, which holds the boning up wonderfully. It does not slip! There are even pockets big enough to hold an iphone plus. The slit is perfect, and there is a natural floof to it, so I don't need to get a bustle like I was worried about. It trails behind you when you walk. Understated but gorgeous. Edit: 4 stars because I sewed each button on myself to make sure it would fall off (was held on by a thread). And a button did fall off when I pulled it out, but I'm getting it tailored so I'll probably have them fix it. Kind of a bummer because its super noticeable but I also might be able to super glue it back on.

Very pleased. I got the black XL. I'm 5'9, 38D. It is wonderfully slimming. It fits great, no underarm gap, fits well above and across the bust and waist, just right in the waist and hips, and perfect length. It washed well in cold water on delicate and is now hanging to air dry. I say it fits great but it was kind of blah and unbecoming until I put a 2" wide black elastic belt with it, and that did the trick. Got a great set of belts on Amazon (JASGOOD Women Stretchy Belt for Dresses Vintage Elastic Wide Waist Belt,Suit for Waist Size 42-47 Inches, A-Black+Brown+Beige+Red(4 PCS) for a really good price. Any of those 4 colors of belts, except the beige one, will look great with this dress. Light colored belts to me do not look good on larger women. This dress seems to be well-made. It's a strange synthetic fabric but is lightweight, and the ruffle at the bottom is such a nice touch and makes the skirt move and flow gracefully when walking. I normally don't like ties dangling on my arms or back, but I like this dress so much that I may learn to cope with that, or maybe sew the shoulder tie to make it simply a shoulder strap.

Elegant Sparkles and Design, Beautiful Gown I got the blush gold color for a Christmas Concert. I absolutely love this gown. I made the right decision by not sizing up. The only alteration was for length, half inch of outer material and 1” from lining. I read the reviews about the beading. My dress came in all beads intact but it did loose a few beads of a row in the back in the process of dry cleaning and trying on, I can’t say when. The gown came with extra beads and I fixed the one row in the back and reinforced a few that were loose. Totally worth it, the gown is delightful, just loved it, a total vision.

Beautiful Trail of Bling I got the Rose Gold, size 16 Mother of the Groom dress. I have 36DDD chest and am 5’-9” tall. It fit perfect. It was stunning and I got many compliments. Bride was very happy with the dress. However, everywhere I went I was leaving a trail of sequins. Every room, all over, it was dropping sequins. See attached photo; the flower has four petals and one of the petals has lost the sequins after only wearing one time. Everyone could tell where I sat to watch the ceremony, or where I paused to get snacks, etc. Good thing I was only using it for one wedding; if I wore it for another couple of days it would start to look really rough with missing sequins. This is beautiful but probably a one-time wear dress.

I got the royal blue in small. I. 4ft11 & 140lbs. This dress is cute & comfortable. Not see through but not super thick either. It flows well in a spin & molds to my body just enough to not make me look overweight as I am. The only thing missing is pockets but I won't hold that against anyone. I felt cuter than I've felt since my January surgery & it's August.

Very flattering! I got the rust floral color in medium. I was concerned it might look too much like a sexy bedtime nightgown, but it's actually very elegant for event attire. I struggled most with the neckline, which seemed to just rest awkward. My small 34B chest does nothing to fill in. Surprisingly, the awkward neckline doesn't show in photos. It was the first thing my hubby noticed, though. I think I'd need tape to get the neck to rest and stay in an appropriate position. (I'm a tomboy. I have no idea how to arrange the neck. LOL. But the dress makes me look elegant!) The straps are adjustable, which helps a lot. (I'm 5'7", 125 lbs with very wide shoulders.) If you have broad shoulders and/or a pronounced collarbone, this dress will make your top flattering regardless of chest size. (There is plenty of extra fabric for larger busts.) Get some boob tape to add lift and guard your nips. You cannot see through the rust color, so wear whatever panties you like. (I recommend the Under Armour "UA Pure Stretch" hipster panties for seamless comfort.) This fabric does NOT stretch, so I got the medium. There is a side zipper, but I didn't need to use it. A small would technically fit, but I think the looser fit of the medium is more sexy (and comfortable) with how the fabric gently drapes. Although I got a fall color, I think it's more of a late summer dress. It's almost like wearing nothing, so you'd need a long, warm jacket to attempt this in colder weather. I would totally consider this dress in more colors.

Beautiful! Exactly as pictured. I got this as a Latter-day Saint temple dress. Great price for such a nice dress! The material is good quality and hangs nicely. Beautiful dress for the price I got this dress for an upcoming cruise and am really looking forward to wearing it. I was concerned that it would be too long (I'm 5'2") but with low heels, it works nicely. It might be short on taller folks but the tulip/wrapped hem would allow some flexibility.The fabric is polyester but is soft and flows well. I had seen an up close picture in another review and was concerned about the hem and the stitching on the finished edges being untidy but my dress does not have any of those issues. Another comment from a review mentioned the plastic snap on the bodice, which is an issue for me. After initially opening the snap, it will not stay closed. For me, it is not a problem because the placement of the snap does not work for me and I will be moving it or devising a different closure.A nice feature of this dress is that it has an underskirt. The main skirt does not seem sheer (maybe it is for the lighter colors?), I like that the under skirt is there to a) help with draping of the dress and b) make me feel more secure about not exposing too much should the dress fall open. The dress comes with a tie closure and side loops to keep it in place. There are some loose threads on the dress but I can easily clean those up.At $31, this is a great value for a semi-formal/formal dress.

So gorgeous! I got this dress in the color BURGUNDY in a size 12. For sizing reference, I'm usually a medium-large on top and am currently either a 36E/36F. In bottoms, I'm usually a medium-large or a 8-12/29-31 in pants/jeans, and if it helps, I wear a size 6 or 8 in Lulu leggings. I'm 5'3" tall with a short torso, and my measurements are about 44"-33"-44" (bust-waist-hip) right now, give or take. I've been on the hunt for a dress to wear to an upcoming work holiday party and this is the second one I tried. It's a little more on the formal end of things, but not so much so that you couldn't wear it for a more casual event. I'm so glad I read the reviews and went with my usual size 12, because it fits me absolutely perfectly. I'd definitely consider this TTS. This does have a stretchy back panel to it that's hard to see in the product photos and in mine, but it spans from about the top of the back to the top of the waistband (hiding under the fluttery top in my back pic). Thanks to that, it does make that area of the dress forgiving, but the rest of it has no stretch, so keep that in mind. I'm not wearing a bra in the pics but it was supportive enough that I didn't feel the need to. The fit is so cute. I've tried other dresses with a similar shape (like that Show Me Your Mumu dress everyone loved years ago, with the fluttery top area) but they didn't hug the waist like this, so they weren't as flattering. I love that this one has that gathered material around the waist because it actually gives some definition, but it's also not tight on the tummy... It's the perfect fit, seriously. It's been a long time since I've tried a piece of clothing on and felt this beautiful. I still say that I kind of wish the fluttery part around the bust was a little shorter, as I already have a bigger bust and it just makes it look bulkier, but I can get past that. I really appreciate that you can wear the sleeves on or off the shoulder. Obviously it's intended to wear off, but they're stretchy enough that you can do either. The slit is a really nice length and hits me about mid-thigh, so nothing racy. I'm on the shorter side and had lots of extra length at the bottom, so I would need to wear heels, so that's good for the taller girls. Also, I have slightly thicker arms and didn't have any issues with the sleeves cutting into them. The material (top/outer layer) feels sort of like chiffon, as it's light and fluttery and very prone to static. I was moving it around to position the sleeve layers and the skirt and they kept clinging to my skin, so I would maybe recommend some static guard if it's doing that to you as well. I would also say to bring a steamer with you if you're traveling with it, as that fluttery layer tends to wrinkle, as you can see in my pics. Overall, this is such a stunning dress and I highly recommend. It looks great on so many different body types and is flattering while still being comfortable.

I've been on the hunt for a dress to wear to an upcoming work holiday party and this is the second one I tried. It's a little more on the formal end of things, but not so much so that you couldn't wear it for a more casual event. I'm so glad I read the reviews and went with my usual size 12, because it fits me absolutely perfectly. I'd definitely consider this TTS. This does have a stretchy back panel to it that's hard to see in the product photos and in mine, but it spans from about the top of the back to the top of the waistband (hiding under the fluttery top in my back pic). Thanks to that, it does make that area of the dress forgiving, but the rest of it has no stretch, so keep that in mind. I'm not wearing a bra in the pics but it was supportive enough that I didn't feel the need to. The fit is so cute. I've tried other dresses with a similar shape (like that Show Me Your Mumu dress everyone loved years ago, with the fluttery top area) but they didn't hug the waist like this, so they weren't as flattering. I love that this one has that gathered material around the waist because it actually gives some definition, but it's also not tight on the tummy... It's the perfect fit, seriously. It's been a long time since I've tried a piece of clothing on and felt this beautiful. I still say that I kind of wish the fluttery part around the bust was a little shorter, as I already have a bigger bust and it just makes it look bulkier, but I can get past that. I really appreciate that you can wear the sleeves on or off the shoulder. Obviously it's intended to wear off, but they're stretchy enough that you can do either. The slit is a really nice length and hits me about mid-thigh, so nothing racy. I'm on the shorter side and had lots of extra length at the bottom, so I would need to wear heels, so that's good for the taller girls. Also, I have slightly thicker arms and didn't have any issues with the sleeves cutting into them. The material (top/outer layer) feels sort of like chiffon, as it's light and fluttery and very prone to static. I was moving it around to position the sleeve layers and the skirt and they kept clinging to my skin, so I would maybe recommend some static guard if it's doing that to you as well. I would also say to bring a steamer with you if you're traveling with it, as that fluttery layer tends to wrinkle, as you can see in my pics. Overall, this is such a stunning dress and I highly recommend. It looks great on so many different body types and is flattering while still being comfortable.

Size down if you’re inbetween 🤔 I got this dress in two sizes small (1st pics) and medium (2nd pics) I am 138 lbs 5’5. I normally wear mediums to larges in most dresses. I ended up fitting much better in the small and didn’t have the problem of my shoulders falling down so often and the bust fit me much better, I think it’s meant to just be tight fitting. I have bigger arms and both gave me ample room in the arm and the pleating around the stomach is very flattering for those of us with a little belly. The material has a lot of give and it’s a very nice weight, the design is cute. If you’re having issues with the lining poking out and the bust dropping too low you can fix it with some iron on hemming tape and a small stay stitch at the desired place for the bust or if you don’t like sewing you could use some garment tape. Super cute I’ll be getting more from them soon! 🙂

I got this women's V-neck 3/4 sleeve chiffon blouse by Timeson to go with my favorite party pants to dress them up for an upcoming trip. I ordered size large, and I am 5'3" and 135 lbs. I enjoy a looser fit, and I feel it fits me perfectly for a tunic top with chiffon fabric so it can be a little flowy. It is thin and lightweight but you can't see through it at all - it is very modest. The fabric is soft, and the body of the top is lined with a soft nylon-like fabric which is very comfy. My mom who is a fabric artist says this kind of fabric may be susceptible to picking, so I will use it for dressy occasions on the trip before wearing it to work as my workplace is hard on clothes. I do not know yet how sturdy it is and I do not want to test that out and risk ruining this beautiful top. It is 22" across at the front of the bust (44" all the way around), 22" from neck to the end of the sleeve, 28" straight down from shoulder to hem, 23" across at hem (46" all the way around). It comes in different colors, so choose the one that's best for you and your wardrobe. I'm happy with the navy blue because it looks nice with my pants, but I can see ordering this versatile top in various colors. I like it very much so far and it will be comfortable to wear while still looking nice!

Perfect length for tall girls I had a funeral to go to. A main issue I typically run into is finding a dress long enough. I’m 5’7 and 195lbs and as you can see the XL fit perfectly. Love this dress! I had a Gala to attend and this dress did not disappoint. I'm 5'2", about 145lbs. Typically I'm nervous about the length but it was perfect.

Comfortable and stylish for price I had a special event with a specific color palette to match. This teal color worked beautifully for the gala! Very comfortable and flattering fit. Flattering and affordable I had a wedding I knew about for quite some time but completely forgot to order a dress for it! I found one I loved on another site but it wasn’t going to get to me in time. I had to venture on to my next best option of Prime delivery on Amazon! Now on to what you actually care about: -Great fit! Because it’s a wrap dress, you can make it fit comfortably. I tried to pull over more for the chest but wasn’t successful. If you are hoping to be more reserved, you’ll need to find a way to close the top a bit more. -Great length for me. Im 5’4” and it just hit the floor in the back with heels. Sorry, didn’t take a full length picture! -Nice material. It isn’t the softest but great for the price. There is a weird slit where the tie comes out that seems bigger than needed and some skin shows but it isn’t noticeable at all. It was definitely a dress worth the cost!

Nervous order I had a wedding to go to and my husband was wearing a blue suit so I was trying to find a blue dress to wear. There was not a single store in town that had dresses so I had to order from here, I was extremely nervous since my timeline was short. I am 5'7 and 141#, this dress fit me like a dream! The only complaint I had is that I couldn't get the wrinkles to come out from being shipped in the bag. I tried a wrinkle release spray, steamer, hanging it in the bathroom while someone showers... nothing worked. The wrinkles were not that noticable once you put it on because of how the dress laid on you, but it was just annoying knowing I couldn't get it out. I was just shocked to know this dress actually looked as good in person as it did in the picture on Amazon lol

So comfortable!!! I had a wedding. I’m 5’5”, 204lbs. My bust is 38 DD. It was a little small in the bust so it gapped. I loved the dress, super comfortable! Love the color! fabric and smell was fine. Quality was good. It almost covered my sandals. Loved the sleeves.

Gorgeous last-minute dress I had an event for which I needed a dress but nothing I had fit, and I’m petite (5’2”) so it’s hard to buy things off the rack. It camouflaged my tummy and hips. I’m a size 8-10 on the top and 12 on the bottom, and I bought a size large. I wore 3 inch heels. I took off one star because when you sit down you have to hold the sides of the dress together because it goes all the way up to the top of your thigh 🤣

Almost perfect I had an unexpected event to attend and needed a dress quickly! I was unsure about sizing so I purchase both the XL and XXL. I wear a size 12 normally. The XL was a good fit for where I was going. If I wanted the dress to be a little more fitted I could have definitely fit a Large because it has a lot of stretch! I’m 5’2 so it was a little long on me even with high heels but over all I received lots of compliments!
I had been eyeing this dress for a while & finally ordered it for my baby shower. Let’s just say I need every color! Perfect length (I’m 5’4) & SO COMFY!

Absolutely stunning I had been eyeing this dress for a while as an option for a wedding I attended last weekend. Finally bought it to try it out and am so happy I did. It was fantastic! I got so many compliments and I felt amazing in it. Super comfortable, sexy and easy to take care of. I paired it with champagne shoes and clutch, and rose gold jewelry and I absolutely love the overall look! For reference, I'm 5'3, 185 and wear a size 14. I got this in a Large and it fit perfectly.

Very cute even on larger busts! I had been wanting this dress for over a year and I finally bought it. A great decision! It’s super cute for work or a night out. I thought the ruffles would be weird on my larger size bust, but it actually doesn’t look terrible. I’ll be keeping this! I’m 139lbs, 5’3”, and waist 28 hips 38. I ordered a size Small.

Buy it! I had formal event and originally bought a $250 dress. At the last minute I started to panic and wanted options. I decided to buy a few dresses from Amazon.. “I can return whatever I don’t use” right?.. well this dress was my final choice and was absolutely stunning! I got so many compliments. It’s form fitting but stretchy and comfortable. And it held up at the dry cleaners. I’m 5’3, 125lbs and I ordered a small

Just okay I had high expectations for this dress. However, when I put it on, it just didn’t look right on me. For one, it was too small in the breast area. I wear a 36DD and the girls were falling out! Another thing was I felt like it made me look larger than I am. I’m not sure what exactly it was but it just didn’t flatter my body.

Not the right proportions for me I had high hopes for this dress, but the proportions are not meant for my body shape. I ordered an XL based on the sizing recommendations. As a reference, I'm 5'2", 155 pounds. The top is too big, especially the shoulders, and the bottom is much too tight. Even with shaperwear, I had to squeeze in, and the result was not flattering. The only way this would fit properly would be if I lost 15 pounds on the bottom half of my body and transferred it to my upper half. The dress itself, aside from the sizing, is very pretty. The ruffles are feminine, and the two gold circles at the waist add a stylish touch. I'd recommend this for ladies with a bigger bust and smaller hips. I'm hippier than I am busty, so it just didn't work for me. Too bad, it's a really cute dress. P.S. Please disregard the streaky mirror!

Not the dress for me I had high hopes for this dress, but unfortunately, it just didn’t work for me. As someone on the bigger/curvier side and only 5’2”, I think this dress might be better suited for someone taller and skinner. I ordered an XL, but the zipper wouldn’t go all the way up for me. I ended up tucking in the unzipped portion on my back and tying the top part, which wasn’t ideal. The sizing felt off; while it wasn’t big enough in the torso, it was surprisingly loose around the bust. I had to really tighten the shoulder straps and the tie-back bow to get a somewhat decent fit. If the fit was the only issue, I would have deducted just one star, but I also found the fabric and construction to be subpar, especially considering the price. The fabric is very thin and has a rough texture, even after washing, which was disappointing. Overall, I wouldn’t recommend this dress for anyone with a similar body type or for those looking for a higher-quality fabric. It’s a shame because the design had potential, but it fell short in execution.

Best Dress Ever I had my baby almost 2 years ago and gained 70 lbs within the last 1.5 years. It has been so hard for me finding a dress that fits my body type and that is comfortable. I will say, I was scared to try it on thinking the sequence would make me itch but boy was I wrong. This dress fit perfect and was sooo comfortable. AMAZING dress I had my doubts about ordering a dress for a wedding online but this dress exceeded my expectations!! Great quality, especially for the price! Fit perfectly and true to size! I’m 5’4” 136lbs and ordered a size 4. I absolutely loved that the entire back was corset style so it could be adjusted to fit tighter or looser depending on need. The straps are also adjustable. The only thing I had to alter was the length but I’m pretty short and wore flat sandals. Would definitely recommend any bridesmaids to order this dress and not spend an arm and a leg!

A Real Stunner! I had my finger crossed on this one- and I had my doubts. No need! The lace is substantial but soft to the touch, the fit is perfect, and the red color could not be more flattering. I bought this dress for my dance club's annual Holiday Ball, which is a semi formal/formal event, so I needed a gown or a really nice cocktail dress. I cannot wait to wear this thing. I have red dance heels, and as luck would have it, they are the identical same color. Fit: I was worried because you cannot really be sure when you buy online. I bought the S because I am normally a size 4 or S in stores. For reference, I am 5'5" tall, 122 lbs, 35-29-37. This dress fits perfectly and clings just right in all the right places. It has enough stretch to be both comfortable and sexy without being too big anywhere. It falls to right at the top of the knee. The cap sleeve adds a bit of modesty to my aging arms (I am almost 73). I could not be more pleased and I expect to dance the night away and have a wonderful evening!

Just buy it! I had read reviews about it being “slimming” and I was actually shocked on how much it actually did snatch me up. The material is good quality and thick. Disappointed in weird fit at the chest I had such high hopes for this dress. In the pictures it looks like my perfect satin dress, and it even looks and feels nice off of me, but the fit is not good. I got XS, which is the right size for me, but the chest area was loose on me and I had to tighten the straps. I don't know if it's because of this or just because of how the dress was sewn, but it bunched up weirdly under my armpits. From the front it's really not flattering. I'm sad. If the chest/rib area fit me better, I would happily wear it. The sage color is beautiful. But I also think it should be longer. It doesn't even reach my ankles. I'm 5'6" and 115 lb.

Love this, runs large I had such mixed emotions about ordering these sweaters, I purchased the Flaxen, Chocolate & Blue. They all 3 for the same and have the same soft amazing fabric that is stretchy. It’s absolutely deep cut since it’s just the twist. For reference I’m 5’5, 36DD and guessing close to 200lbs. I hope this helps. I ordered the 3 in mediums and my weight fluctuates like crazy so I’m actually debating exchanging one of them for a small. The stitching on the tri-colors Flaxen & Blue are driving me insane though, especially on the blue. If the threading wasn’t white it wouldn’t matter, but it drives me crazy. See pics.

GET THIS DRESS!! I had this dress in my cart for a few weeks while I debated and read reviews. I’m SO glad I bought it! Absolutely Gorgeous! I had this dress saved in my cart for a good two months before I finally bought it for a wedding this coming fall. I am absolutely in love with the dress - the color is a gorgeous army green, the fabric is light and flowy yet has some stretch to it, and the cut is perfect. I have issues with dresses because I am busty (38D) and wear a size 5/6 pants/jeans, so they are either tight on top or big all around. I ordered a Large, and it fits me perfectly - not tight, just perfect. The shoulder strap scarves that hang down make it so elegant. I cannot wait to dazzle in this dress in October!

Super cute and comfy. I had this for months and never wore it for some reason. I finally put it in for Easter. It’s so cute. It’s thin but not see through. I had this one for 7 hours and the seam split my the breast area. I’m a size 32B and had a medium. The fit wasn’t even tight, the sewing was poor quality and it was ripping even when I had it on for 2 hours. I do not recommend this dress.

This material is so soft I had to attend a banquet for my husbands job and I realized I had no formal dresses whatsoever. I needed something to come in quickly and I searched hours for a dress. I’m 5’5” and I was wearing 3 in heels in the photo. The dress barely touched the ground when I was walking.

Casual long dress I had to order a dress last minute to attend a function. I ordered this dress because I knew it would fit me even if I have a big chest. I was excepting the dress to be very fancy. I'm 5'6" and I wore two inch heels and the dress was still dragging on the floor.

Best wedding dress I had to quickly find a wedding dress that would allow me to dance but still look pretty and this was it!!! Fit perfectly and had a sort of built in bra that allowed the girls to be free but not noticeable. Got many compliments. There was a small stain but nothing a quick wash couldn’t handle. For reference, I’m 5’4 and 135 pounds.

STUNNING dress I had tried on an Alex Evenings dress, so I knew that the 10 fit me in another style. I ordered the 10, and it fit like a glove. I'm 5'6' 148, 36DD. I did wear a tight under garment, and this dress fit and looked beautiful. It packet well in my suitcase and I felt great wearing it. It hit just above the knee. The plum color was a deep purple. beautiful dress.

The braidesmaid gown under $70 I had two bridesmaids. My daughter and my little sister. This is a picture of a size 4. My daughter is 5ft. 127lbs, a little hippy but not a lot. The only thing is you have to be comfortable showing a little thigh.

I hate dresses but I LOVE this one! I hate dresses. I absolutely hate them. I always look pregnant or show rolls or whatever. However, I absolutely LOVE this dress! I'm 5' 7" and weigh almost 230 lbs and this is a size 18 and it fits perfectly! The hem of it hits just above the floor so it'll be a great length once I have on heels. This is the 4th thing I've tried in order to find the perfect Mother-of-the-Bride outfit and it's the winner! It's also very soft despite the look and it sparkles elegantly. Such a pretty color, too!

Great fit I hate going shopping and trying on. Had an event and needed an evening dress so I ordered this dress & was pleasant surprised at the fit & quality for the price. It is a lite sheer but once on that wasn't an issue. Im 5'4" and I had to wear heels so the dress did t touch the ground (expected for my height) got several compliments. The lace was not itchy. Flowy with a stretchy under skirt.

Shocked! I hate ordering dresses online because I can’t try them on, and I also NEVER get form fitting dresses because I’m usually uncomfortable. BUT this dress despite the style was VERY FLATTERING! It was very comfortable and fit well in all the right places! If your on the fence about it- DO IT! I don’t regret it! If it helps I am 5’5 and weigh 195 pounds.

Quality Dress for Formal Occasions I hate shopping for clothes online because it's so unpredictable what you might get. I specifically wanted to leave a review for this dress to hopefully help other women find a great dress online! I wore this as a wedding guest and got loads of compliments on it. The material is thick (though not heavy) and the fit was great. It was fitted over my bust and waistline while skimming over my belly and thighs. You can't really wear a bra with it, but I just used some removable pads from an old swimsuit. My only (minor) complaints are that the underarm zipper is hard to get up past the seam at the waistline and the hem of the bottom layer of the wrap skirt is noticeable through the top layer (you can see it across my thigh in the photo). I'm 5'5", ~150 lbs, busty, and wore a medium.

Fits great! I have 1 issue with the dress, which I noticed when I first opened the package. There is a glue from the hem right in the center on the top. I almost gave the rating a 3 star due to that. I ordered this for a Gala we are attending in a couple of weeks. I ordered a medium and it fits as expected. I am 5'7" 150lbs 36/28/42.the dress is very comfortable and moves very nicely as you walk. I like the runch look and design of the dress. The color is perfect and exactly what I was looking for. I would say the size chart is accurate. The ruffled bottom hem looks really cute! Once you add some cute heels this is a great dress that will be a winner for events from time to time. At least the glue is in an area no one but myself or husband will notices, but a disappointment in the arrival of the dress. I would get from this brand again. You cannot go to most stores and get a dress of this quality for this price. There were no issues with any other parts of this dress.

Amazing Fabric!! I have 34DDD sideset breasts and they look okay here with no bra. I'm wearing a shaper to help my waist (that's the black you see at the bottom of the V). Overall, I love the dress. It fits really well and the fabric is amazing! I could wear it all day!
Sizing off I have a 35 inch waist and this is measuring 19 1/2 so that would fit almost a 40 inch waist. The quality is good enough, but the price is too high to me for this material and stitching

Perfect for middle school homecoming!! I have a 67-70lb 6th grader, who needed an appropriate looking, modest homecoming dress. It’s hard, due to her small frame, to find a dress that fits well. The XXS fits perfect. Covers all body parts and looks age appropriate. Nice quality of the dress, too!

A closet staple! I have a few colors in this compliments my body shape well!! Get so many compliments every time I wear it. I’m 5’1 size 38b weigh 187 with a mom pouch. UPDATE** I sized down as I’m losing weight and bought a white dress this time only to have to return it. The material was much thinner and different than the xl and was highly disappointed when the zipper popped before even trying on!! The xl fabric is thick and formal. The smaller sizes are thin and see through 😥 bought my second in the white and I’m likely staying away from it. So sad. This is my 4th purchase now. I compared to my other colors in this dress and it is AWFUL the fabric is cheaper the length is 4 inches longer doesn’t fit like my others in this exact dress. Never again.

Sexy dress I have a size 42G cup size. I knew the top wouldn’t fit completely. I still love the dress. I got so many compliments when I wore it on my bday. Thank you

Absolutely love it! I have a very hard time finding dress that fit me properly. I wear a 38D bra and size 6 bottoms. Most dress that fit my chest are baggy and frumpy looking. This dress was amazing. I ordered a medium and it fit like it was made for me. There is enough stretch in the material that is it super comfortable. I wore it with nude heels to an evening wedding and received so many compliments. Several ladies asked me for the link. I plan to order another in a brighter color for any summer events I may have.

Great Product! I have a wedding I am attending next month and have been struggling to find the right dress! The wedding is more casual, but my husband is a groomsman and will be in a tux so it might finding the right dress a challenge. I took a gamble with this dress and I was in love as soon as I put it on. The fabric is thicker than I expected and very wel made. It ties nicely in the back and has some stretch to it. I am 5’4”, 135 lbs, and a 32 DDD and it fit like a glove on top! You can easily wear a strapless bra underneath without exposure. I would definitely purchase this item again!

It's ok! I have an upcoming formal event to attend so ordered this dress. I am going to return it, but mostly because I feel like I look like a mother of the bride rather than a wedding attendee. It is comfortable! The top lace portion is kind of thick but not scratchy or uncomfortable. There is a weird ripple right where the lace joins in the center of the bust area (see the arrow in my first pic). This might be fixed by ordering one size down? Not sure. Getting the zipper up/down near the transition from skirt to lace bust area is difficult and makes me feel like it may only last a couple of zips. Also the start of the fabric ripple thing on the skirt doesn't look great, almost like it's ripped? I'm not super versed in clothing or anything so this could just be how it's supposed to be, minus the excess string ball that you can see in the pic I posted. I tried to show the liner for the bust in one of the pics, I liked it! It almost looks like a sweetheart neckline under the lace, hard to see in the pics I took b.c. the lighting wasn't great. I purchased the 3XL. I am 5'6" approx 215 lbs and my bra size is 40G. I have never had an issue with a bust being too big, but this one is haha Probably wouldn't be if I sized down? Also, I'm wearing shapewear under the dress to try to help smooth things out. Overall it's not a bad purchase, just doesn't fit what I'm looking for! Hope this helps someone else 😊👍

Beautiful! I have bad lighting and a dirty mirror so you really can’t tell how nice this dress actually is but I seriously love it! I ordered it not really having high expectations but I need a dress for a wedding this weekend and I don’t have many options. It ended up being way more flattering than I thought and I love the color. I am 5’3 and it definitely needs to be hemmed. As you can tell it’s also slightly big in the chest (I’m a 42DD) but it’s nothing some tape can’t fix. Definitely listen to all the reviews that say to size up. I’m normally at 14/16 so I ended up getting the 18 and it fits perfect. I can’t wait to wear it!

Perf work pants I have been looking everywhere for pants like these… Saw these on TikTok and couldn’t wait to purchase and try them on. I went with the XL short. I am 4’10 174pounds. They pass the sitdown test. But I kind of want to try a size large because these are nice and flowy. The only thing that would make this look even better is style it up with a chain belt. It says in the description that this doesn’t have stretch, but I’m someone that needs stretch in all my pants and these feel nice and comfy to me. The short fit me perfect with or without heels. Buy the pants !!

Lace will snag easily - but such a lovely dress to wear! I have been looking for a dress for a wedding. I am 5'4", about 165 lbs, and pear shaped with a mom pooch. I got the L based on the size chart, as this is not an A line dress so it is best as a pear to size up.Pros: I fell really great in the dress - my pictures don't do it justice, in my opinion. It is so comfortable and easy to wear! I love the lace on the sleeves and skirt below the knee. I love how the cut isn't super boxy, isn't super tight, but still the cut give shape to my rear.Cons: The lace will snag really easily! You will need to be super careful what jewelry you wear. I tried to add a belt, but I really think the lace would snag or rub and pill. This makes me anxious, which is why I dropped a star. I would hand wash this, carefully.

A very flattering dress if you can fill out the top I have been looking for a dress to wear to a wedding. I am 5'4" roughly 165 lbs. I am a pear shape who has had 2 kiddos, so I have my mom pooch. I am wearing a size 12.Pros: The dress does not gape in the chest as it is sewn to the top of the V. It covers my knees. It has sleeves, and arm holes are neither too small or too big. My bra strap is covered in the back. The material is lightweight and comfortable. The fabric is smooth and soft and doesn't feel like it would easily snag. I felt very pretty in this dress. There are 'cups' in the fabric, which help give the dress shape.Cons: I probably should have opted for the size 10, being a pear shape. The top is too big and the shoulders fell off my shoulders. I can't wear this in public at this size. The bodice sits high, which allow the pooch to be hidden in the pleats, but the feeling of the bodice stopping at the bottom of my ribs was a little unusual.Takeaways - if you are a pear shape, you may opt to size down on the sizing chart. If you size up, be aware the top my slide off your shoulders.

Elegant and comfortable I have been looking for a nice dress to wear to our Christmas Eve church service. This dress is perfect. It’s very comfortable and the lace is soft, not itchy. It fits true to size and the fabric is stretchy. It’s a little longer than I prefer (I’m 5’5”), but still a nice length. It would be best worn with a strapless bra or maybe nude. I love it!

Great lightweight warm weather dress for work or formal I have been looking for an everyday low maintenance dress appropriate for warm weather like this for a long time. The material is light and breathable and feels great; especially for polyester. I am 5'7" and the dress falls just to my knees which makes it perfect for work as well as for after hours. Being a US size 14 and upon reading other reviews that the sizing on this dress runs a bit small, I ordered a size up from my usual large and got the XL and couldn't be happier. One criticism of this dress was the material wasn't opaque enough but I ordered the polka dot in black as you can see from the photo and found it to be fine. Would highly recommend!

cute set but shorts did not look good on me I have been seeing this particular style from the 90s coming back over the end of summer. I got this in black and for me, curvy, 5'7", the top fits a bit loosely on my body in a decent way that might pair well with something over it or under. The shorts unfortunately do not do me any favors and I look stocky and wide. I'm glad its machine washable. I haven't washed it yet but it seems promising that it won't shrink given what its made of. I really like that they are nice pieces that can also be worn as separates, so you have lots of ways to work with this 2 piece. I will probably keep the shorts for at home use since they are not flattering.

Buy the dress! I have been wanting this dress from the minute I saw it in an add over a year ago, but that seller wanted over $100 and I was not about to pay that much. This is worth every penny! (Please don't mind the bra strap, my lazy ass was so excited to try it on) The material is way nicer than I expected for the price, it's like soft on the inside! It is long, so I will have to hem it. BUT... I'm crazy shocked at the quality. I'm 5' 2" and 118 lbs. I got a size small based off of other reviews. Fit's like a glove. There is stretch so it's comfy, I'm not used to wearing such fitted things, so I debated sending it back for a medium, but then the one arm sleeve at the shoulder will be too off. And even that being said, I might have to shorten that. I'm going to a high flut'en wedding and I was worried that I would be ok in this dress, it will be PERFECT!
Beautiful Dress I have gotten so many compliments with this dress. It’s very soft and comfy. I am 5’5’ 127 lbs 34D and big hips with tiny waist and I ordered a Medium and it fits great.

It got a thumbs up from me I have lil tit 36C so it was a lil loose around the top but I used double sided tape. It was perfect. Material is soft. Just enough stretch. Got to put out my thigh meat lol. Love it. Went down to my feet. I got Large. Im 5'6, 190, with hips lol

Beautiful Fabric, Nice style, odd flap I have mixed feelings about this dress. On the positive side, it's really cute, form-fitting and very stretchy, and the material feels wonderful. I’m 5’11”, and this dress is long! even with a 4.5 inch heel the dress was still hitting the floor. It is very comfortable to move in though. The stretchy fabric is super soft and comfortable to wear however the dress is not lined other than in the bust area. I love how silky it feels, but it doesn’t provide much support, so shapewear might be in order if you're looking for a smoother silhouette. The chest area is a little odd, the flap of satin at the front feels a bit wide and tends to sit high up, I almost wish it was designed so that it was at the rear of the dress, in fact initially when I put it on that's where it went and it actually looked pretty good. The straps are nicely embroidered but do feel a little thin, so I hope one doesn't snap and I have a wardrobe malfunction! That being said, the design itself is stunning, with its flaws being minor I'd say I'm happy with the dress, just know that it's likely to require alteration at the hem and shapewear to make it work. For 52.99 which is the price at time of my review I feel it offers reasonable value.

Perfect for a night in Riviera Maya I have multiple of these dresses. I get so many compliments each time I wear a new one out on the town or out of the country! Took this dress (along with another similar pattern of different color though) on our Mexico trip. So many compliments!.These dresses are not see through at all and lined inside. Built in slip! I'm 5ft 4 and 138lbs and bought a medium. I definitely could have ordered a small! Theyre all quite beautiful and come with tons of compliments! It's a very FLATTERING dress for women of a certain age. Covers and camouflages the belly from life and motherhood. Makes you feel verrrrry sexy and confident:) Possible irritation under the arms from the sequins if worn for long periods or if your arms are meaty.

BUY IT I have never had such good luck with an Amazon dress before! I order an XL as suggested but maybe could have gotten a Large. It has stretch and kind of feels like neoprene with its density in the shoulders but more soft and even stretchier in the skirt portion. I am 5’6 and usually wear a 12 in jeans and large in shirts. I’m a 38 DDD AND WAS VERY WORRIED about the girls not fitting or drooping. Well there’s a dad gum built in boobie sling in these!! I’m still going to tape so I can dance around, but this dress literally has everything. I’m going to slightly take it in myself at the waist but all my dresses need altered since my waist is 12 inches smaller than my hips and bust. SO. If you’re contemplating, just do it. It’s fabulous and I’m wearing this to a masquerade ball on new years eve. I’m pretty sure I’m going to stand out! ❤️

I have never left a product review before, let alone with a photo but wowwww this dress made me feel like a million bucks. It snatches where it needs to and smooths what it needs to. I was able to go for dinner and drinks without worrying about looking / feeling bloated in a tight dress. I was hesitant to buy this based on the price but will absolutely buy more styles and colors. Worth every penny 🤩 I do wish it provided more lift up top, but I just wore a bra. For reference I’m 5’5 ~185, and the large was perfect for me.

A surprise dream dress! I have NEVER left a product review in my life but felt it was my duty to society to leave a review on this dress. THIS DRESS IS A DREAM. I ordered it on a whim and didn’t try it on until the day before the wedding I decided to wear it to. I’m 5’8”, ~135lbs and a size 34C. At the wedding at least 20 strangers came up to me to tell me how much they loved the dress, 4 of which bought it on the spot! Since the wedding 3 of my friends have also ordered this dress! It’s comfortable, doesn’t fall, is true to size and wedding dancing approved! If you’re between sizes I would definitely size down because the back band is stretchy and accommodating! Everyone should own this dress and I will definitely be purchasing other colors!

Everything I was looking for! I have never received so many compliments! This dress was perfect for my son's wedding. The fabric is high quality and stunning. The color is a pure hunter green that leans toward blue. Not only that, but it is very comfortable and did not need to be ironed even traveling across the country in a carry-on suitcase. I am 5'8 and 140. The size 8 fit me without alterations. There is some "give" in the fabric, so if you wanted to wear something a little more form fitting, you might be able go down a size. It wasn't tight on me at all, and I feel like it enhanced my figure. I like that it wasn't low cut and that it didn't have a slit to the leg or down the back. I might shorten it so I can wear it for other festive occasions like Christmas parties.

Beautiful dress I have never received so many compliments! I wear this when I work on our Christmas trips and I have dozens of compliments every time I wear it. It is very low cut, but I purchased black safety pins and a brooch to pin it and it is perfect. I am 5'6 and this touches the top of my feet. I purchased the 16W and I typically wear a 16 at Torrid for size reference. Also, there is no stretch in the waist but it fits beautifully.

THIS DRESS IS INCREDIBLE I have NEVER written a product review on Amazon before, so that's saying something about this dress. As a plus sized girly, it's sometimes difficult to find dresses that fit and look flattering. This dress truly made me feel like a baddie. I will say, SIZE UP! I am 5'6" - 230 lbs and normally buy an XL or maybe an XXL depending. This dress I needed to buy in a 3XL. Relaxed fit for a trendy business casual look I have to admit I was not completely confident I would love the way this two piece fit, when ordering, however always looking for great buys on business casual attire so figured it would be worth a shot. So excited I did because this set fits perfectly! For the record, I am 5’3 and roughly 135 pounds. Dress size is typically a 4, but I am in the late stages of postpartum, so still dealing with a bit of troublesome tummy area. Because of my self-consciousness about my stomach, many outfits just don’t seem to have a very flattering fit. Because of the high waist on these pants and the looseness in the leg, not only did it gather in to give me a more hourglass shape, but it flowed seamlessly from the waist down into the leg. The back of the pants has some elasticity, but not enough to where it pulls, puckles and looks tacky. It offers a rather discreet look, which I absolutely love as I’m not a fan of elastic waistbands. The pants just barely graze the floor barefoot, so with heels it’s a perfect length to showcase my shoes and for a more casual look with flats still a good length to where they don’t obnoxiously drag. The jacket has an interesting fit. The arms are fitted yet not too tight and the shoulders have light padding but not pronounced. The bodice doesn’t exactly conform to the body, so when buttoned, it looks like it should be tapered just a bit, however worn unbuttoned, gives more of a trendy casual look. The jacket is cropped and stops right at the waistline. It also helps to hide any excess body pudge that might come over the seam of the waist line slightly. I have a shorter torso so it sits a few inches below the waist, but is made to accommodate a wide range of torsos as I think it would be equally flattering on someone with a longer torso. In my case, the set flowed together very well and is unbeatable in price. I plan on ordering in every color available, I like it so much. Definitely recommend!!

Surprisingly Attractive I have to be honest, I wasn't sure I could wear something like this. I still feel like I probably need shapewear under it, but I was shocked to find I actually like it. The VFSHOW Womens Formal Prom Sexy Strap Ruched U Neck Ruffle Evening Gown is a quality gown that fits like a glove. It is ideal for thin, tall women, but even on my slightly plump and short person it was okay. For reference, I am 5'4" (borderline petite), wear a size 10/12 usually, or size Medium US size, weigh 175-lbs give or take a few, have a 36C chest and size 32-34" waist. I got the size large. The length is slightly long on me, even with high heels, but wearable. I might hem it a bit higher to be sure I don't trip on it, though. The chest support is not great, so when I wear this out I want to have some additional support, but it definitely catches the eye. I like the ruffle with the adjustable leg slit which masks my lumpy thighs. I can only dream of those youthful, toned thighs of the model. The ruffle also helps disguise the mom-belly thing I have going on, making me willing to actually wear this in public. The dress fabric is heavy and thick compared to some dresses, but I think that is what you want in this. It has a lot of stretch and I might have even fit a medium but it would have been a bit snug. The zipper is smooth and hidden and the stitching excellent. I am very happy with the dress!

Tasteful yet sexy! I have to say that this dress far exceeded my expectations! My husband actually bought it for me and when it arrived I was so shocked that it was much nicer than I expected. I am an older lady but felt young and sexy in this dress. The neckline is a very deep V so I found a bra that was low enough to work. I’m 5’2”, 120 lbs, 34DD, and 30 inch waist. With dresses, I usually end up buying a size 20 for the bottom, and the top part ends up too big, but this fits perfectly. I'd say this 2X fits like a plus size 18. The layered parts fall in such a way that they don't overemphasize any particular areas, which can be an issue for some of us. I'm about 5'5" and the length is good with and without slight heels. (It is a longer dress, but not too long). It's a little sheer towards the bottom, as you can see in the second picture.Definitely recommend this as an addition to your summer dress wardrobe.

Beautiful Dress! I love it how dress. I didn’t want to take it off. It traveled to our destination wedding in the bag it arrived in (rolled up). Didn’t need steaming on arrival.
