Perfect for busty girls! I LOVE IT! It's absolutely adorable and so flattering. I wear my 50s dresses with a quality petticoat to get the big flair in the skirt. This fabric is actually a good quality thickness though. So for those who don't wear petticoats, it could still look great.I usually have a problem with these dresses not being made for larger busts. I'm a 42DDD and this looks so great on me! The secret is the stretchy back! Beneath the lace-up back is very stretchy so it would give a flattering fit on a wide range of bust sizes. I'm wearing a strapless bra in the picture. I was afraid the back might be too low to hide it, but that's not a problem at all.The side zipper is, of course, clutch! No help needed to get in an out.I'm impressed with the fabric thickness. These are usually a very cheap fabric. This one is durable and absolutely no transparency. The top is even lined.I usually wear a 2x in normal women's cloths (or an XL in unisex shirts). I sized up to a 3X because that's always a good idea in these types of dresses. And it's a perfect fit. So I say size up one size for sure.I'm bookmarking this dress to order other patterns later! For now, though, I can't wait to wear this to Halloween brunch!100% recommend!UPDATE: My sister in law loves it so much, she ordered one for herself. Twinsies!UPDATE 2: Added some more pictures! Got to wear this out once already and got SO MANY compliments on it! Ordering it in red for Christmas! My friend who I had brunch with loved it so much she's ordering one too! We're going to convert them to straps though. Should be a simple sewing job. You also have the long belt as extra material if you need it. I'm going to make a matching headband for the Halloween one with the belt material.UPDATE 3: As promised, I bought it in red for Christmas. We just sewed the straps down in the back. I wore a bolero over it so we didn't pay much attention to making them look perfect. It was an easy job. again, I received a million compliments.I'm wearing it with the Malco Modes "Zooey" Chiffon Petticoat. "Zooey" is the fluff size I'm wearing. I tried a "Jennifer" but sent it back because it was too much puff. Invest in a good petticoat and you can buy all of these 50's dresses for cheap and they look amazing. The chiffon is also smooth and silky and not at all hot. And when the lace edge shows through, it's cute -- not obscene.Next wedding I get invited to, I'll be ordering one of the prints!

Classy lines, modern stretch. I love it! This is the small, and the fit is great. I was a little nervous - I bought based on my usual measurements (35-26-36) and then actually took some new measurements and realized I'd added an inch or more everywhere during quarantine. Oops! I was hoping the stretch would offer a little forgiveness, and it does. Until I drop the extra inch I might go with something like Spanx to keep the lines smooth, but it's not so tight I'd be uncomfortable wearing it as-is.The fabric is nice and thick and has a decent amount of stretch. If you don't like pulling things down if they start to shimmy, you might size up a bit. It does come out of the bag a little rumpled from shipping, but that's nothing a quick once-over with a steamer won't fix.This cut is very flattering, and I'm impressed with the quality for the price. I have fairly muscular arms, so the sleeves are snug but not uncomfortably so. The length at my 5'5" hits me at a very lady-like just below the knee. The collar was standing up awkwardly out of the package, but it fell into place after hitting it with the steamer.I think this is a very classy style - can't wait to wear it out and about! I'll definitely be buying more from this brand.

Great Fit and Length, But the Dots? I love long dresses, and this one certainly fits the bill. The design makes it perfect for twirling, which I enjoy. The material is thin, but the dress has some weight to it, likely due to the elastic panel that forms the top part of the dress. There’s no iffy chemical smell. I ordered one size up because I didn’t want the dress to be too fitted. This size fits me perfectly, but I think a smaller size would have worked just as well, thanks to the elastic top that accommodates various chest sizes. This is a pullover dress without a zipper. It’s unlined and features two side pockets. I really love the length—it’s on the longer side, falling about two inches above my ankles. The sleeves are also longer, which is great for me since I have long arms; they reach past my wrists. It’s very comfortable and twirl-friendly. The only thing I’m unsure about is the dots on the fabric. For some reason, they make the dress feel a bit less elegant to me. For reference, I am 5’7” and 128 lbs. I’m planning to wear it next week for a short trip. I think this dress works well for early fall.

Double lined so it isn't see through!! I love that this dress is double lined so that it isn't see through. The quality of the material is pretty thick and durable. I appreciate that there is lining around the top of the dress to keep it from slipping down. I am about 5'1" and the dress is a maxi length on me - but not too long so you can still see my shoes which is nice. I am really impressed with this dress and would definitely get again.

Unusual but eye-catching style I love the asymmetrical cut of the top of this dress. The top is lined and hangs nicely once the dress is steamed out—which, by the way, was easy after I hung it dry pretty wet. The skirt is not lined but also hangs well and is a nice length for a cocktail reception. The fabric is lovely; the beige is champagne—pinkish not yellowish The dress construction is just OK, but acceptable for a dress at this price point. I did not find the neck tight as some reviewers did, but I agree that the dress would support more bra choices if the right arm hole wasn’t cut so deep. I’m small chested, so am wearing just silicone pasties in these photos. I have a strapless that sits low that works too, although it may peek out when I’m dancing. If you add a hook & eye at the base of the neck below the buttons, you could also wear a halter style bra that wraps at the base of the neck. For reference, I’m just under 5’8” and 118 lbs.

This is not tall girl or curvy girl friendly. If you’re hippy, the crotch area will do that annoying thing where is bunched up that all of us who have hips understand. The model must be very short for the bottoms to hit the floor. The legs aren’t very long. I’m barely 5’6 but I have long legs and the bottoms barely graze my ankles. I wish designers would add length to pants so that they flatter multiple heights and body types. Other than the length (or lack thereof), I like this and it’s a nice casual errand day or light brunch outfit.

Perfect fit, except for length, love it anyway I love this dress! Because of the two way stretch of this fabric, it is very comfortable to wear and accommodates a variety of body types. I wanted a dress with sleeves and wasn't too snug or too loose--this dress fits the way I wanted. I ordered an XL, since I'm borderline US size L/XL. I think I could have fit the L, but the sleeves might have been too tight. I'm 5'4" and knee the length would be too long, so I was expecting that and knew I'd need to hem it. I am an experienced seamstress, so I figured I could hem it to my preferred length. When I buy an already made article of clothing, I don't like to have to alter it, but this dress is worth it. I deducted one star because it is not available in a wearable length (unless you are really tall). After trying it on, I had my daughter pin the back of the dress at the heel where I wanted the finished hem to be. Then I added about an inch for the hem allowance. I cut off about 3 3/8" (about 8.5 cm). I haven't had time to buy the right color thread and sew the hem yet, but I have worn it since I cut it, since the fabric doesn't fray. I am planning to contact the seller to see if I can order future dresses from them with a custom length (I love the dress enough to want it in other colors).

My only complaint is that it's a bit wrinkly, and may need a steam before every wear, which is not a problem. I love the stretch in the fabric. You might need help zipping up and hooking the top. Bra straps do not show at the shoulder - a bonus! If you want to be noticed this is definitely the dress to do it in. I had a million compliments.
Love it! Perfect for the Wedding! I love this dress! I am 5'8 165 lbs, D chest and got a large. It fits perfect. Paired it with nude shoes.

This dress is perfect!!! I love this dress! I am a pear-shaped 5’4” and 140 lbs and this fit perfectly in medium. So comfortable! Sleeves are sheer and there is a built in liner so it’s not see through at the bottom. The waist area is also stretchy and not tight. The tie back is so cute too. It says “summer dress” but I paired it with my boots for this Christmas party. Can’t wait to wear it this summer with some cute sandals.

Love it! I love this dress! I bought a size small. I’m 5’2, 120lbs, D cup. It fit perfectly! I like that the belt fabric is separate so it allows you to tie it how you like. Not see through at all and it was very comfortable. 10/10!

Very flattering fit I love this dress! I bought for a wedding. The fit is very flattering. I am 6 months post partum so still have some belly pooch. This dress is tighter in the waist but loose around the lower stomach so it was perfect for me. I am 5’5 and 165 lbs. I ordered an XL. I tried a size large, but it was too tight in the waist.

Love this dress for so many reasons! I love this dress! I bought it for myself for a red dress photo series Im doing in NYC (Im a photographer). The material is so comfortable & doesnt wrinkle at all so I just roll it up in my backpack and throw it on over my shorts & tank when Im at my photo location. I have worn it at least 10 can so far & I’m going yo buy more in other colors! I have size small, 5’5 1/2, 127 pounds. I wear it with a slight platform sneakers (so not too long) during my photo sessions.

Beautiful dress! I love this dress! I bought it to wear as a Cruella costume, and it worked perfectly. You could also wear this dress as a Minnie Mouse costume with Minnie ears, white gloves, and yellow shoes. For reference, I am 5‘9“ and 125 pounds, and I ordered an XS. The dress came to right above my knees, so it was definitely long enough. also, I wore a black petticoat underneath it. The petticoat definitely gives it the extra flare that I was looking for.

Very happy! I love this dress! I bought to wear to my son’s graduation and it was very comfortable and flattering. I’m 5’5” around 135lbs and I got a medium. I would say it runs slightly larger than my normal mediums, but still fit well. If you’re between sizes, I would just go down one and it should fit perfectly! The fabric is stretchy and the quality is there. I’m really happy with pretty much everything about this dress and will probably order it in black too.

MY ABSOLUTE FAVORITE DRESS HANDS DOWN!! I LOVE THIS DRESS! I gained a bit of weight during quarantine and none of my nice dresses fit me anymore. After plans changed due to Covid, I had less than a week to find a dress for a small wedding we were attending. With no stores having dressing rooms open, and it being too short notice to order from my usual dress sites, I turned to amazon and crossed my fingers! And dang did amazon deliver! (pun intended 😂) I ordered a size large after reading many reviews and I’m really glad I did. Many people had commented that the middle section was a bit loose and I found this to be true as well. I have larger hips and a decently round booty so there was a bit of extra fabric around my lower back that I didn’t love. Luckily I know how to sew and just added two darts to that area to take it in a bit and then it was like absolute magic! The chest area fit perfectly for me, but that being said, I have a rather small chest unlike most people who tend to wear a size large. I can see how any one with a larger bust might feel a bit snug. The length of the dress was perfect for me which is usually another concern of mine. I am rather tall with a long torso (5’9), but the lace hit right at the top of the knee and the underskirt a few inches above that. I got SOOOOOO many compliments on this dress and everyone was so shocked that I had gotten it for so cheap off of amazon just two days prior! Also the color was amazing! My boyfriend was obsessed with it and decided he needs to take me to a nice dinner soon so I can wear it again 😂 If your debating getting this dress, just do it! Read other people’s reviews that are similar in size to you rather than relying only on the size chart and you won’t be disappointed!
PERFECT DRESS I love this dress! I got an XL and it was absolutely perfect!! I’m 5’9 and 218 pounds! This dress fits like a glove!! Must be curvy!!

Wonderful dress, fits great, well made and super comfy I LOVE this dress! I got it for a wedding with a very specific dress code and it was so comfy, classy and fits great. Ordered size L for 5'8" 180 and athletic build and it fit so well. I got tons of compliments and felt like a million bucks.

Love it! I love this dress! I have had the hardest time finding a elegant, flattering, romantic, dress that fits me. I ordered a 2x but honestly think I could have gone down a size, however I want to look like a Grecian Goddess for my wedding and so I think a looser fit is better. My measurements are these: Bust: 46" Waist: 36" Hips: 48" Hight: 5' 6" My only complaint is that the dress is unlined and about 3 inches to long. So I will have to wear heals or hold it up when I walk.

Sexy but modest dress, runs large I love this dress! I needed a dress for a Christmas party and this was the perfect color and style. For reference I am 5’5” 116lbs measurements 32-26-38. I got the small and it fits me great in the hips but ran a little large in the bust and waist on me. What I love is the style of this dress. The side ruffle looks great on curves and really accentuates and gives an hour glass shape. The ruching also has a nice effect that hides the lower stomach area which when you’ve had a baby is something I appreciate. I also really like that the neckline is more modest. I can wear a fancy necklace with it and it wouldn’t look too over the top. It’s very unique. It just runs a little large so I will have to take it in a little at the bust and waist.

Beautiful Dress! I love this dress! I ordered it in two different color patterns and wore to two different weddings this summer. I got lots of compliments! The fabric feels like silk/satin but the dress was lightweight enough that I wasn’t hot. I think the pleats helped give it a figure hugging silhouette without making you feel like a sausage. I’m 135-140bs, typically a size 6/8, 36D bra, height 5’6”, and I ordered a small in both and still had some room that nothing was tight at all. Don’t hesitate, get it!

Great dress! I love this dress! I ordered the medium and it fit perfectly. I’m 5’6” and weigh 150. I usually wear a size large in women’s shirts or medium in regular t-shirts and a size ten for my pants. After I got it I washed it on my machines gentle cycle and hung it to dry. I also bought the petty coat that is suggested with this dress. I wound up cutting out one layer of the petty coat cuz I thought it was a little too poofy for me. But with one layer I loved it! Oh and make sure you get out your lint roller. I highly recommend this dress! You’ll love it!

I love this dress! I purchased this to wear as part of a Halloween costume, but the quality is so great at the dress is so comfortable that I know I'll be wearing it again. I am 5'1", usually wear US 14. I ordered an XL and the dress falls to the floor. The fabric is heavy and has great stretch without being too thin when stretched. I'm very pleased with my purchase.

Just beautiful Darling! Gorgeous! I Love this dress! I received so so many complaints! I order an 2xl because im very wide in the hips and backside. Im 5”2...245. It came with a slip which was great. It fits true to size, the lace gives a lil bit. But because I was going to a bday party I wanted to be more flirty and paired it with shorts and a black bra. It fits great. I tacked the sleeves only to make them tighter at my wrist! Other than that Im ordering a few more in other colors!

BUY THIS DRESS!! I LOVE THIS DRESS! I usually don’t write reviews, but I couldn’t not tell you how awesome this dress is. I bought it for a wedding I attended, and then I decided to use it for family photos as well (I NEVER opt for a dress over jeans for family pics) {also - my husbands and my tradition to find the trashiest place for a photo op every year 😂🤦🏼‍♀️🤷🏼‍♀️) I am 5’4 - 140 and the M fits like a glove. There isn’t as much stretch in the material as I thought it would, but honestly it’s almost better that way. More of a true cotton material vs. a jersey knit. The slit does go all the way up, so a windy day could make for some leg exposure, but it was manageable. If you’re on the fence, BUY THE DRESS and a good strapless bra. Worth every penny.

I love this dress! I was a little hesitant when I saw some of the photos, the quality looked poor, but then others looked good. I ordered this for my baby shower, I'm 7months pregnant and wanted someone elegant and flowy. I had no idea what size I would be wearing, I took a shot in the dark, since it said it ran a little small, I ordered a 22, (same size as my wedding dress from 1 1/2 years ago) and fit very well, could have gotten a 20 but I wanted a looser fit. Not too tight on the chest. I wear 40DDD bra. Arms were a little loose but could easily be taken in. Length was perfect. I'm 5'6" I was barefoot and it was grazing the floor. I really love this dress I got a lot of compliments and no one believed it was as inexpensive as it was.
